question:
[Previous Feedback] Perfect! Sprint 7 has been officially closed with all timestamps in the correct format. The closure record properly documents the sprint end time and the next sprint start.

Please draft a weekly summary email to the PM, saving it as day05/weekly_email_draft.json in JSON format. Include: to (array of recipient email addresses), subject (email subject line), draft_created_at (current time around 13:30), scheduled_send_at (14:00 today, before the sprint review), and body_summary (a brief summary string of the email content).

content.text:
[Thu 2026-03-19 02:05 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Perfect! Sprint 7 has been officially closed with all timestamps in the correct format. The closure record properly documents the sprint end time and the next sprint start.

Please draft a weekly summary email to the PM, saving it as day05/weekly_email_draft.json in JSON format. Include: to (array of recipient email addresses), subject (email subject line), draft_created_at (current time around 13:30), scheduled_send_at (14:00 today, before the sprint review), and body_summary (a brief summary string of the email content).
